ProductPage.warrantyReturnsRich: This timepiece is covered by an <warranty>Essence of Watches warranty</warranty> for added peace of mind. Every watch is thoroughly inspected and authenticated prior to sale. Insured shipping is included. <returns>Returns</returns> are governed by our <inspection>7-day inspection window</inspection> after delivery—see that policy for conditions and how to start a return.
ProductPage.shippingInfoBody: All orders are shipped fully insured via FedEx or UPS. Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days. Tracking information will be provided once your order ships.
ProductPage.whyBody: Every watch we offer is carefully curated, authenticated, and inspected to meet our standards. We focus on quality over volume, offering timepieces we would confidently wear ourselves. No marketplaces. No uncertainty. Just exceptional watches, sourced with intention.
ProductPage.accordionWarrantyBody: Every timepiece from Essence of Watches comes with a comprehensive 2-year warranty covering manufacturing defects and movement issues. Our in-house master watchmakers thoroughly inspect and service each watch before shipping.
ProductPage.accordionDeliveryBody:
We offer fully insured, tracked shipping via FedEx Priority. Domestic orders typically arrive within 1-3 business days. International shipping is available to most countries with delivery times of 3-7 business days.

All shipments require a signature upon delivery for security purposes.
ProductPage.descriptionFallback1: This stunning {brand} {model} features a {dial} dial housed in a {caseSize} {material} case.
ProductPage.descriptionFallback2: The watch comes in {condition} condition with {boxPapers}, making it an exceptional addition to any collection.

PriceContext.marketDisclaimer: Based on recent secondary market sales for comparable listings; ranges vary by condition, box & papers, and timing—not a guarantee of appraisal value.

AuthCertificate.title: Certificate of Authenticity
AuthCertificate.inspectionStatement: This timepiece has been inspected, authenticated, and verified by Essence of Watches specialists.
AuthCertificate.footerLegal: This document is issued for the watch described above. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited. For verification inquiries, contact Essence of Watches with this certificate number.

Authenticity.heroIntro: Every timepiece we sell is guaranteed 100% authentic. Our rigorous multi-point inspection process ensures you receive only genuine luxury watches—authenticated before shipment and backed by a 7-day inspection window after delivery if the watch is not as described, plus our lifetime authenticity guarantee.
Authenticity.g1Description: Authenticated in-house before shipment—serial verification, movement inspection, and parts originality against our listing.
Authenticity.g3Description: After delivery, inspect against our listing; if something material does not match, we make it right with return and full refund per our policy.
Authenticity.g4Description: Verified by certified horologists with 20+ years experience.
Authenticity.processIntro: Every watch undergoes our comprehensive authentication process before being listed for sale. Nothing leaves our facility without passing all five stages.
Authenticity.step01Body: Every timepiece undergoes a comprehensive visual inspection. We examine the case, dial, hands, crown, crystal, and bracelet against manufacturer specifications.
Authenticity.step02Body: Our certified watchmakers open the case back to inspect and photograph the movement. We verify serial numbers, caliber authenticity, and component originality.
Authenticity.step03Body: Each watch is tested on professional timing machines to measure accuracy, amplitude, and beat error. Water resistance testing is performed where applicable.
Authenticity.step04Body: We verify all accompanying documentation including certificates, warranty cards, and service records against known authentic examples and manufacturer databases.
Authenticity.step05Body: Upon passing all inspections, each watch receives our Certificate of Authenticity with detailed condition notes, serial verification, and high-resolution photographs.
Authenticity.certBody: Every watch comes with our comprehensive Certificate of Authenticity, documenting the complete inspection results and providing you with permanent proof of authenticity.
Authenticity.wrongIntro: In the extremely unlikely event that a watch purchased from us is determined to be inauthentic by an authorized service center, we will:
Authenticity.wrong1Body: We take every claim seriously and respond within 24 hours.
Authenticity.wrong2Body: We pay for return shipping and any assessment fees.
Authenticity.wrong3Body: You receive a complete refund of the purchase price.
Authenticity.ctaBody: Every watch in our collection has passed our rigorous authentication process and comes with our lifetime authenticity guarantee.

BuyerProtection.title: Buyer Protection
BuyerProtection.subtitle: How we stand behind every sale—plain language, no marketplace runaround.
BuyerProtection.intro: You are buying from a specialist dealer—not an anonymous listing. That means clear condition disclosure before you pay, authentication before we ship, and a defined window to confirm the watch matches what we promised. Below is how protection works from checkout to delivery and beyond.
BuyerProtection.inspectionBody: From the day your watch arrives, you have seven calendar days to inspect it against our listing and photographs. If anything material is not as described—condition, completeness, or specification—we arrange return shipping and a full refund once we receive and verify the piece. Use the window deliberately: try the watch on, check the bracelet and clasp, and compare to what you were sold. If it is right, you keep it. If it is not, you tell us early.
BuyerProtection.inspectionPolicyRich: Process and exclusions for change-of-mind versus "not as described" claims are set out in our <returns>Returns & Refunds</returns> policy.
BuyerProtection.authBody: Nothing leaves our hands until it clears our internal process. That includes serial verification against manufacturer records and known-good patterns for the reference; movement inspection by qualified watchmakers—timing, function, and signs of tampering or incorrect parts; and a parts originality check on dial, hands, case, bracelet, and crystal where applicable, consistent with the stated year and configuration.
BuyerProtection.authClosingRich: Read the full methodology on our <auth>Authenticity</auth> page.
BuyerProtection.shippingBody: Every shipment is sent fully insured for its journey to you. If a carrier incident occurs in transit, you are not left arguing with a platform—you work with us, and we work with the insurer. That is part of the price of doing business the right way.
BuyerProtection.paymentBody: Card and checkout flows run through established payment providers built for e-commerce. We do not store your full card details on our servers. What we retain is what we need to fulfill your order and support you afterward—never more than necessary.
BuyerProtection.warrantyBodyRich: Every purchase includes our two-year mechanical warranty from the date of sale—covering defects in the movement, case, and bracelet under normal use, subject to exclusions. Terms, claims, and turnaround are spelled out on our <warranty>Warranty</warranty> page.
BuyerProtection.directBody: Essence of Watches is not a marketplace and not a drop-ship aggregator. When you have a question before or after the sale, you reach our team—people who handle authentication, condition grading, and fulfillment in-house. That direct line is part of the product.
BuyerProtection.questionsBody: If something is unclear before you buy, ask. We prefer one thorough conversation to a surprise after delivery.

Warranty.title: Warranty
Warranty.intro: Every watch we sell is backed by a two-year Essence of Watches warranty from the date of purchase. This document explains what we stand behind, what we do not cover, and how we resolve legitimate issues—clearly, without fine print meant to confuse you.
Warranty.coveredBody: During the warranty period, we cover mechanical defects that arise in the movement, case, and bracelet under normal use—provided the watch has not been subjected to excluded conditions below. This includes faults in the movement affecting timekeeping or function traceable to manufacturing or assembly when the watch has been worn and stored as intended, and mechanical issues with the case or bracelet attributable to defects in materials or workmanship—not cosmetic aging alone. Coverage runs for two years from your purchase date with Essence of Watches. Keep your order confirmation or receipt; we may ask for it to confirm eligibility.
Warranty.excludedBody: Accidental damage from drops, impacts, or misuse is excluded. Water damage—including immersion or moisture ingress beyond the watch's rated use or after gasket aging—is excluded, and we do not warranty against flooding, steam, or hot-tub exposure. Unauthorized repairs by anyone other than Essence of Watches or our authorized service partners void coverage for affected components. Normal wear and tear such as gradual patina, bracelet stretch, clasp wear, and finish changes from daily wear is excluded. Cosmetic issues alone—scratches, dings, dial spotting from age, or appearance complaints where the movement and seals remain within specification—are not covered.
Warranty.claimBody: Email warranty@essenceofwatches.com with your order number, the reference and serial (if applicable), and a clear description of the issue. Photos or short video help us triage faster. We will review your message and, if the claim falls within this warranty, arrange inspection. After inspection, we may elect to repair or replace the timepiece—or the affected components—at our sole discretion, based on what restores the watch properly rather than what is cheapest in the short term. Do not ship a watch until we confirm instructions; unauthorized returns may delay or complicate your claim.
Warranty.turnaroundBody: Warranty service typically takes four to six weeks, depending on parts availability, manufacturer lead times, and the complexity of the repair. We will communicate realistic timelines once your watch is in our hands—not a black hole.
Warranty.transferBody: This warranty is issued to the original purchaser named on the order and is non-transferable. A subsequent owner is not covered under Essence of Watches warranty terms, though they may still benefit from any remaining manufacturer warranty where applicable and valid.
Warranty.relatedBody: Returns and general conditions are governed separately. If you are inside the return window, start there first.

1.title: Expert Review

2.title: Receive Offer

3.title: Ship Securely

SourcePage.successBody: Thank you. Our sourcing team will follow up within 24 hours.
SourcePage.heroDescription: Can't find what you're looking for? Let our experts source the perfect Rolex for you. With our extensive network and expertise, we can locate even the rarest timepieces.
SourcePage.footnote: * Required fields. We typically respond within 24 hours.
SourcePage.benefit1Body: Access to exclusive dealers and collectors worldwide. We leverage relationships built over years to find your perfect timepiece.
SourcePage.benefit2Body: Our sourcing service is completely free with no commitment required. You only proceed if we find exactly what you want.
SourcePage.benefit3Body: We typically locate watches within 2-4 weeks. For common models, we often find options within days.
SourcePage.trustNote: Every watch we source undergoes our comprehensive authentication process and comes with our standard warranty and documentation.

AppointmentPage.successBody: Thank you for your interest. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment.
AppointmentPage.heroDescription: Schedule a private viewing with our horological experts. Whether you're acquiring, selling, or seeking authentication—we're here to guide you.
AppointmentPage.formSubtitle: All fields are required unless marked optional
AppointmentPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about what you're looking for...
AppointmentPage.privacyNoteRich: By submitting, you agree to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

ContactPage.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
ContactPage.intro: Have a question about a timepiece, need help with an order, or interested in selling? Our team of watch experts is ready to assist you.
